items.standfirst: The 46-year-old was stopped at about 9.30pm on Friday while preparing to board a Jetstar flight to Perth, according to the Nation ThailandGet our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcastAn Australian man has been arrested at a Thai airport in connection with the alleged murder of a 17-year-old girl whose body was found in a suitcase, according to local media reports.The 46-year-old was stopped at about 9.30pm on Friday while preparing to travel on Jetstar flight to Perth, according to the Nation Thailand. Continue reading...
